project.name: E2E Email Rendering & Browser Tests
project.description: Introduce Mailpit as an SMTP capture server, build MailCapturePort interface with MailpitClient adapter, verify all 18 Mailables render correctly with screenshot baselines, test 6 critical email dispatch flows end-to-end via Dusk and Feature tests, validate email links for XSS safety, implement visual regression with GD pixel diff, and add CI workflow. Agent-browser verification is embedded in each flow test story.

user_stories.title: Security: gitignore .env.dusk.local + config() override trait
user_stories.description: .env.dusk.local is committed to git with APP_KEY=base64:kICJ... in plain text. Not in .gitignore. This is a security violation. Fix by gitignoring the file, removing from tracking, creating .env.dusk.local.example with placeholder values, and creating OverridesMailConfig trait for test SMTP config via config() overrides instead of .env.
steps: RED: Write a test that asserts .env.dusk.local is listed in .gitignore
GREEN: Add .env.dusk.local to .gitignore
Remove .env.dusk.local from git tracking: git rm --cached .env.dusk.local
Create .env.dusk.local.example (tracked) with placeholder values and NO secrets
Create tests/Traits/OverridesMailConfig.php with setUpMailConfig() that sets Mailpit SMTP config via config() calls
Run Pint, run full test suite to verify no regressions
acceptance_criteria: .env.dusk.local is NOT tracked in git
.gitignore contains .env.dusk.local entry
.env.dusk.local.example exists with placeholder APP_KEY and NO real secrets
OverridesMailConfig trait sets SMTP host to 127.0.0.1:1025 via config()
Full test suite passes without .env.dusk.local being tracked
definition_of_done: git status shows .env.dusk.local as untracked (not staged/modified)
OverridesMailConfig trait created and Pint clean
php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)
user_stories.verification: git ls-files .env.dusk.local (should return empty) && php artisan test && php vendor/bin/pint --test

user_stories.title: Install Mailpit and configure test environment
user_stories.description: Set up Mailpit SMTP capture server for local development and testing. Create tools/mailpit/ directory with README installation instructions. Add binary patterns to .gitignore. Do NOT modify any .env file â€” all SMTP config is handled via config() overrides in test setUp().
steps: Create tools/mailpit/README.md with installation instructions (Scoop: scoop install mailpit, or manual Go binary download)
Add tools/mailpit/mailpit* to .gitignore (binary exclusion)
Add tools/mailpit/.gitkeep
Manual verification: start Mailpit, send test email via php artisan tinker, confirm at http://localhost:8025/api/v1/messages
acceptance_criteria: tools/mailpit/README.md contains installation instructions for Windows (Scoop) and manual download
tools/mailpit/mailpit* is in .gitignore
Mailpit binary NOT committed to git
Mailpit starts on SMTP:1025, HTTP:8025 when launched
definition_of_done: Mailpit starts and serves API at http://localhost:8025/api/v1/messages

user_stories.title: MailCapturePort interface + MailpitClient adapter + FakeMailCapture
user_stories.description: Create MailCapturePort interface (ports-and-adapters pattern) with 9 methods. Implement MailpitClient adapter using Http::timeout(5)->retry(3, 200). Implement FakeMailCapture in-memory fake for unit tests. Create MailpitConnectionException for structured error handling. Unit test MailpitClient with Http::fake().
steps: RED: Write tests/Unit/Support/MailpitClientTest.php with Http::fake() for messages(), getLatestMessage(), getMessageHtml(), getMessageHeaders(), searchByRecipient(), searchBySubject(), deleteAll(), getMessageLinks(), waitForMessage()
GREEN: Create tests/Support/Contracts/MailCapturePort.php interface
GREEN: Create tests/Support/MailpitClient.php implementing MailCapturePort with Http::baseUrl()->timeout(5)->retry(3, 200)
GREEN: Create tests/Support/FakeMailCapture.php in-memory implementation
Create tests/Support/Exceptions/MailpitConnectionException.php extending RuntimeException
Run Pint, complexity check (cyclomatic <= 7 per method)
acceptance_criteria: MailCapturePort interface has 9 methods: messages(), getLatestMessage(), getMessageHtml(), getMessageHeaders(), searchByRecipient(), searchBySubject(), deleteAll(), getMessageLinks(), waitForMessage()
MailpitClient implements all 9 methods with Http::timeout(5)->retry(3, 200)
FakeMailCapture implements all 9 methods with in-memory storage
MailpitConnectionException thrown on connection failure with structured context
All unit tests pass with Http::fake()
definition_of_done: php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)

user_stories.title: InteractsWithMailpit trait for Dusk + Feature tests
user_stories.description: Create test trait that integrates MailpitClient with Dusk and Feature tests. Provides assertEmailSentTo(), assertEmailCount(), getLatestEmailHtml(), getLatestEmailLinks(), screenshotEmail(), screenshotMailableRender(). Uses OverridesMailConfig for SMTP config. Includes smoke test.
steps: Create tests/Traits/InteractsWithMailpit.php with $mailpit property of type MailCapturePort
Implement setUpMailpit(): instantiate MailpitClient, call deleteAll(), configure mail via OverridesMailConfig
Implement assertEmailSentTo(string $email, ?string $subjectContains = null)
Implement assertEmailCount(int $expected)
Implement getLatestEmailHtml(): string and getLatestEmailLinks(): array
Implement screenshotEmail(Browser $browser, string $name) and screenshotMailableRender(Browser $browser, Mailable $mailable, string $name)
RED: Write tests/Browser/EmailTestSmokeTest.php that sends a test email and asserts Mailpit captures it
GREEN: Smoke test passes with Mailpit running
Run Pint
acceptance_criteria: InteractsWithMailpit trait provides 6 assertion/helper methods
setUpMailpit() clears Mailpit inbox and configures SMTP via config() (not .env)
screenshotEmail() saves captured email HTML to temp file, opens in browser, screenshots to e2e-screenshots/emails/
Smoke test sends email via Mail::raw(), asserts Mailpit captured it
definition_of_done: php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)

user_stories.title: Static render tests for all 18 Mailables (screenshot baselines)
user_stories.description: Render all 18 Mailable classes with factory data, assert they contain vendor layout wrapper and config('app.name'), and screenshot each to e2e-screenshots/emails/. Reuse factory patterns from EmailFooterConsistencyTest and EmailCurrencySymbolTest.
steps: RED: Write tests/Browser/EmailRenderBaselineTest.php with 18 test methods, one per Mailable
Each test: instantiate Mailable with factory data, render, assert HTML contains 'wrapper' class and config('app.name')
Each test: save rendered HTML to temp file, open in headless Chrome via Dusk, screenshot to e2e-screenshots/emails/{MailableName}.png
Create e2e-screenshots/emails/.gitkeep
GREEN: Fix any render failures (may surface pre-existing bugs like PaymentReceived string-vs-enum comparison)
REFACTOR: Extract shared factory helpers to avoid duplication across 18 tests
acceptance_criteria: All 18 Mailables render without exceptions
All 18 rendered HTML strings contain the vendor layout wrapper class
All 18 rendered HTML strings contain config('app.name')
18 screenshot PNGs saved to e2e-screenshots/emails/
definition_of_done: php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)
user_stories.verification: php artisan dusk --filter=EmailRenderBaselineTest && ls e2e-screenshots/emails/*.png | wc -l

user_stories.title: E2E flow: PaymentReceived (trigger -> Mailpit -> agent-browser verify)
user_stories.description: Dusk test: login as landlord, navigate to invoice, record payment, assert Mailpit captures PaymentReceived email with correct recipient, subject, amount, receipt link, and signed unsubscribe URL. Agent-browser verification opens Mailpit UI, inspects email, screenshots, and asserts no secrets leaked.
steps: RED: Write tests/Browser/EmailFlows/PaymentReceivedFlowTest.php
test_recording_payment_sends_email_to_tenant_via_mailpit: Dusk login -> invoice -> record payment -> assert Mailpit captured email
Assert: recipient matches tenant email, subject contains 'Payment Received'
Assert: body contains payment amount, reference, invoice number, Download Receipt link, signed unsubscribe URL (signature=)
Screenshot captured email via screenshotEmail()
GREEN: Mailpit infrastructure from 001-003 makes this pass (no new production code)
REFACTOR: Extract shared login/navigate helpers if duplicated across flow tests
Agent-browser verification: login -> record payment -> Mailpit UI -> click email -> screenshot -> security assertions
acceptance_criteria: Mailpit captures PaymentReceived email after payment recording
Email recipient matches the tenant's email
Email subject contains 'Payment Received'
Email body contains payment amount, reference, invoice number
Email body contains Download Receipt link with valid route
Email body contains signed unsubscribe URL with signature= param
Agent-browser screenshot captured in e2e-screenshots/emails/agent-browser-payment-received.png
No secret_key or APP_KEY present in email body
definition_of_done: No secrets in email body (verified by eval assertions)
php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)
user_stories.verification: php artisan dusk --filter=PaymentReceivedFlowTest && agent-browser --session e2e open http://localhost:8025

user_stories.title: E2E flow: InvoiceSent + InvoiceReminder (with agent-browser verify)
user_stories.description: Dusk test: trigger invoice send via UI, assert Mailpit captures InvoiceSent email. Feature test: trigger InvoiceReminder directly. Assert recipient, subject with invoice number, body with due date/total/pay button, signed unsubscribe. Agent-browser verification included.
steps: RED: Write tests/Browser/EmailFlows/InvoiceNotificationFlowTest.php
test_sending_invoice_dispatches_email_captured_by_mailpit: trigger invoice send via Dusk UI
test_invoice_reminder_email_captured_by_mailpit: trigger via direct Mail::send(new InvoiceReminder($invoice))
Assert: recipient is tenant, subject contains invoice number, body contains due date/total/pay button/unsubscribe
Screenshot both email types
GREEN: No new production code needed
REFACTOR: Shared assertions for common email elements (unsubscribe, footer, app name)
Agent-browser verification: login -> invoices -> send -> Mailpit UI -> screenshot -> security assertions
acceptance_criteria: Mailpit captures InvoiceSent email after invoice send action
Mailpit captures InvoiceReminder email after direct trigger
Both emails have correct recipient (tenant)
Both email subjects contain invoice number
Both email bodies contain due date, total amount, pay button URL
Both emails contain signed unsubscribe URL
Agent-browser screenshot captured
definition_of_done: php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)

user_stories.title: E2E flow: TenantCredentials (with agent-browser login test)
user_stories.description: Dusk test: login as landlord, create lease for vacant unit, assert Mailpit captures TenantCredentials email with login URL, property name (deep model chain), and no leaked APP_KEY. Agent-browser verification verifies login URL present and no secrets.
steps: RED: Write tests/Browser/EmailFlows/TenantCredentialsFlowTest.php
test_creating_lease_sends_tenant_credentials_email: Dusk login -> unit -> create lease -> assert Mailpit captured
Assert: recipient is new tenant, subject contains Welcome/credentials text
Assert: body contains login URL (route('login')), property name (deep chain)
Assert: body does NOT contain raw APP_KEY or base64: key material
GREEN: No new production code; Mailpit captures queued email (sync queue)
REFACTOR: Verify deep model chain doesn't cause N+1 in email render
Agent-browser verification: login -> create lease -> Mailpit UI -> screenshot -> security assertions
acceptance_criteria: Mailpit captures TenantCredentials email after lease creation
Email recipient is the newly created tenant
Email body contains login URL
Email body contains property name from deep model chain
Email body does NOT contain APP_KEY or base64: encryption key
Agent-browser screenshot captured
definition_of_done: Agent-browser verification shows login URL present and no secrets leaked
php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)

user_stories.title: E2E flow: CaretakerInvitation (agent-browser accept link click-through)
user_stories.description: Dusk test: login as landlord, send caretaker invitation, assert Mailpit captures CaretakerInvitation email with accept link. Extract accept URL from email, browse to it, assert public registration page loads. Agent-browser click-through verification.
steps: RED: Write tests/Browser/EmailFlows/CaretakerInvitationFlowTest.php
test_sending_caretaker_invitation_dispatches_email: Dusk login -> invitations -> send -> assert Mailpit captured
Assert: recipient, subject, body contains landlord name/property name/accept link
test_accept_link_in_email_loads_registration_page: extract accept URL from Mailpit -> Dusk browse to URL -> assert registration page loads (public, no auth)
Screenshot both email and accept page
GREEN: No new production code
Agent-browser verification: login -> send invitation -> Mailpit UI -> click email -> screenshot -> click accept link -> screenshot accept page
acceptance_criteria: Mailpit captures CaretakerInvitation email after invitation send
Email contains landlord name and property name
Email contains valid accept link (route('invitations.show', $token))
Browsing to accept link loads registration page (public, no auth required)
Agent-browser screenshots of email and accept page captured
No secret_key in email body
definition_of_done: Agent-browser verification passes with email + accept page screenshots
php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)

user_stories.title: E2E flow: PaymentVerification approved/rejected (with agent-browser)
user_stories.description: Feature test: HTTP POST as landlord to approve/reject verification, assert Mailpit captures PaymentVerificationApproved/Rejected email with correct amounts, status, and unsubscribe link. Reuse createPaymentVerification() helper from EmailFooterConsistencyTest.

test_approving_verification_sends_email_via_mailpit: HTTP POST -> assert Mailpit captured PaymentVerificationApproved
test_rejecting_verification_sends_email_via_mailpit: HTTP POST -> assert Mailpit captured PaymentVerificationRejected with rejection reason
Assert: recipient, subject, body content (amounts, status), unsubscribe link
Uses InteractsWithMailpit + OverridesMailConfig traits
Reuse createPaymentVerification() helper from EmailFooterConsistencyTest

Mailpit captures PaymentVerificationRejected email after rejection POST with rejection reason

Agent-browser screenshot captured

user_stories.title: E2E flow: NotificationMail RFC 8058 headers (with agent-browser)
user_stories.description: Feature test: call NotificationService::sendEmail() with SMTP pointed at Mailpit, assert Mailpit captures email with RFC 8058 List-Unsubscribe and List-Unsubscribe-Post headers, role-based unsubscribe body link, data table rendering, action button scheme validation, and XSS safety.
steps: RED: Write tests/Feature/EmailFlows/NotificationMailFlowTest.php
test_notification_email_captured_by_mailpit_with_rfc8058_headers: call NotificationService::sendEmail() -> assert List-Unsubscribe + List-Unsubscribe-Post headers via getMessageHeaders()
Assert: body contains data table with filtered keys, role-based unsubscribe link
test_notification_email_action_button_scheme_validation: javascript: URL excluded
test_notification_email_xss_safe: HTML in message escaped via nl2br(e())
GREEN: No new production code
Agent-browser verification: Mailpit UI -> click email -> screenshot -> verify unsubscribe link + data table
acceptance_criteria: Mailpit captures NotificationMail with List-Unsubscribe header
List-Unsubscribe-Post header contains List-Unsubscribe=One-Click (RFC 8058)
Body contains data table with filtered keys (no action_url, no non-scalar)
Tenant recipients get signed unsubscribe URL, landlords get /notifications/settings
javascript: URLs excluded from action button
HTML in message body is escaped (XSS safe)
Agent-browser screenshot captured
definition_of_done: php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)

user_stories.title: Email link validation across all 18 Mailables
user_stories.description: Pure PHPUnit test (no Mailpit, no Dusk). Render all 18 Mailables, extract every href, validate URL schemes (no javascript:/data: XSS), resolve internal routes, verify no localhost in production config, and assert signed URLs contain signature= parameter.
steps: RED: Write tests/Feature/EmailLinkValidationTest.php
test_all_mailables_have_valid_url_schemes: render all 18, regex extract hrefs, assert https?:// or mailto: only
test_all_mailables_internal_routes_resolve: extract internal URLs, validate via Route::getRoutes()->match()
test_no_localhost_urls_in_production_config: set APP_URL to production URL, render, assert zero localhost references
test_signed_urls_contain_signature_parameter: for PaymentReceived/NotificationMail, assert signature= present
Reuse Mailable construction patterns from EmailFooterConsistencyTest and EmailCurrencySymbolTest
GREEN: No new production code
REFACTOR: Extract renderAllMailables(): array helper if reused
acceptance_criteria: Zero javascript: or data: protocol links across all 18 Mailables
All internal route URLs resolve via Route::getRoutes()->match()
Zero localhost references when APP_URL is set to production URL
Signed URL Mailables (PaymentReceived, NotificationMail) contain signature= parameter
definition_of_done: php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)

user_stories.title: Visual regression comparison utility (GD pixel diff)
user_stories.description: GD-based visual diff comparer with configurable threshold. Compares baseline and current screenshots pixel-by-pixel, generates diff image highlighting changes in red. Artisan command scans e2e-screenshots/emails/ for pairs and reports pass/fail.
steps: RED: Write tests/Unit/Support/VisualDiffComparerTest.php with 5 tests (identical, completely different, threshold pass, threshold fail, dimension mismatch)
GREEN: Create tests/Support/VisualDiffComparer.php with GD-based pixel comparison, +-5 per channel antialiasing tolerance
GREEN: Create tests/Support/VisualDiffResult.php value object with percentage, passed, diffImagePath
Create app/Console/Commands/CompareEmailScreenshots.php artisan command: email:compare-screenshots
REFACTOR: Extract pixel comparison to separate method for complexity (cyclomatic <= 7)
acceptance_criteria: Identical images return 0% diff
Completely different images return >90% diff
Threshold comparison works (2% diff with 5% threshold passes, 10% fails)
Different dimensions throw exception
Artisan command scans directory and reports per-image pass/fail
definition_of_done: php artisan email:compare-screenshots runs without errors
php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)
user_stories.verification: php artisan test --filter=VisualDiffComparerTest && php artisan email:compare-screenshots

user_stories.title: GitHub Actions CI workflow for email E2E tests
user_stories.description: GitHub Actions workflow triggered on changes to app/Mail/**, email templates, and email test files. Four jobs: email-render-tests, email-flow-tests, email-link-validation, visual-regression. Installs Mailpit binary, runs tests, uploads screenshots as artifacts.
steps: Create .github/workflows/email-e2e.yml with path filters for app/Mail/**, resources/views/emails/**, resources/views/vendor/mail/**, tests/Browser/Email*, tests/Feature/Email*
Job email-render-tests: MySQL service, PHP 8.4, Composer, Mailpit binary download, Dusk EmailRenderBaselineTest, upload screenshots
Job email-flow-tests: Same setup + Mailpit, Dusk EmailFlows, Feature test --group=mailpit, upload screenshots
Job email-link-validation: No Mailpit, php artisan test --filter=EmailLinkValidationTest
Job visual-regression (depends on email-render-tests): Download baseline artifact, run email:compare-screenshots, fail if >5% diff
Test locally via act or manual push to feature branch
acceptance_criteria: Workflow triggers on push/PR with correct path filters
All 4 jobs defined with correct dependencies
Mailpit binary downloaded and started in background for render/flow jobs
Screenshots uploaded as artifacts with 14-day retention
Visual regression job fails pipeline if any diff >5%
definition_of_done: All 4 jobs defined with correct setup
Path filters cover all email-related file paths

user_stories.title: Mobile viewport render tests (375px, 6 tenant-facing emails)
user_stories.description: Render 6 most common tenant-facing emails at iPhone dimensions (375x812). Assert no horizontal overflow. Screenshot with -mobile suffix. Extract viewport helper for reuse.
steps: RED: Write tests/Browser/EmailRenderMobileTest.php with 6 tests (PaymentReceived, InvoiceReminder, InvoiceSent, TenantCredentials, PaymentVerificationApproved, NotificationMail)
Each: render Mailable -> save HTML -> Dusk resize(375, 812) -> open -> screenshot to e2e-screenshots/emails/{name}-mobile.png
Assert: no horizontal overflow (content width <= 375px)
GREEN: Existing responsive CSS should handle this (vendor layout uses max-width: 600px)
REFACTOR: Extract screenshotAtViewport(Browser, html, width, height, name) helper
acceptance_criteria: 6 mobile screenshots captured at 375px width
No horizontal overflow in any email
Button/CTA touch targets visible at mobile dimensions
Screenshots saved with -mobile suffix
definition_of_done: 6 mobile screenshot files exist in e2e-screenshots/emails/
php artisan test passes (full suite, no regressions)
user_stories.verification: php artisan dusk --filter=EmailRenderMobileTest && ls e2e-screenshots/emails/*-mobile.png | wc -l
